title: Local Budget Explorer
problem: City budgets are public but hard for residents to read.
user: Ana, a parent who wants to know why her neighborhood playground has no repairs.
why_it_matters: Public money becomes less accountable when the documents are unreadable.
mvp_scope: Upload or link budget files, extract categories, show plain-language summaries, search by neighborhood or theme.
demo_examples: Ask how much is planned for parks and show the source-linked answer.
continuation_path: Publish cleaned tables, add year comparison, recruit finance mentor.

title: Public Services Navigator
problem: Residents cannot easily find the right office, form, fee, and next step for basic services.
user: Mihai, a new resident trying to register an address change.
why_it_matters: Confusing service paths waste time and punish people with less administrative knowledge.
mvp_scope: Searchable guide with step-by-step answers and source citations.
demo_examples: Type a service need and get required documents, office, fee, and caveats.
continuation_path: Validate top 20 services with municipal staff.

title: FOIA Request Generator
problem: Citizens often do not know how to ask for public information in a legally useful way.
user: Elena, a local resident asking for contract documents about road repairs.
why_it_matters: Public information rights are weak if only specialists can use them.
mvp_scope: Guided form that produces a precise request, subject line, and delivery checklist.
demo_examples: Generate a request for procurement documents and show legal basis.
continuation_path: Add jurisdiction packs and response tracker.

title: Council Decisions Explainer
problem: Council decisions are published in dense documents that residents rarely understand in time to react.
user: Radu, a neighborhood association member tracking zoning decisions.
why_it_matters: Local democracy is weaker when decisions are technically public but practically hidden.
mvp_scope: Extract recent decisions, summarize what changed, who is affected, and where to verify.
demo_examples: Paste a decision PDF and produce a resident-facing brief.
continuation_path: Subscription alerts by topic or neighborhood.

title: Public Procurement Watcher
problem: Procurement notices and awards are scattered, technical, and hard to watch over time.
user: Ioana, a local journalist following repeated awards to the same supplier.
why_it_matters: Procurement is where public money becomes real power.
mvp_scope: Track a small category, summarize new awards, flag repeat suppliers or unusual changes.
demo_examples: Show supplier timeline for one procurement category.
continuation_path: Add human review workflow and publish methodology.

title: Civic Issue Map
problem: Local complaints are spread across social media, forms, and informal channels.
user: Sorin, a neighborhood volunteer collecting broken sidewalk reports.
why_it_matters: Patterns stay invisible when complaints remain isolated.
mvp_scope: Map issues, cluster by type, generate status notes, export CSV.
demo_examples: Add five reports and show clustered neighborhood problems.
continuation_path: Integrate with existing civic reporting groups.

title: School Rights Assistant
problem: Parents and students struggle to understand school rights, procedures, and complaint paths.
user: Maria, a high-school student asking what to do about an unfair disciplinary decision.
why_it_matters: Rights that cannot be understood are rights that cannot be used.
mvp_scope: Question-and-answer guide with source links, plain-language caveats, and escalation paths.
demo_examples: Ask about a school procedure and get a cited answer.
continuation_path: Legal review, youth testing, translated versions.

title: NGO Admin Copilot
problem: Small NGOs lose time on repetitive reporting, grant, and volunteer admin.
user: Cristina, an NGO coordinator preparing a funder report after work hours.
why_it_matters: Civic groups burn out when admin eats the time meant for public work.
mvp_scope: Generate report drafts from structured notes, checklist missing info, export Markdown.
demo_examples: Turn activity notes into a report draft with missing fields marked.

title: Local Journalism Research Assistant
problem: Local reporters need fast help reading documents, timelines, and public records.
user: Andrei, a local reporter checking claims in a council debate.
why_it_matters: Local journalism has too much document work and too little time.
mvp_scope: Source notebook that summarizes documents, extracts entities, and tracks citations.
demo_examples: Upload three documents and generate a timeline with source links.
continuation_path: Newsroom pilot with strict verification rules.

title: PDF-to-Open-Data Converter
problem: Public information is often trapped in scanned or messy PDFs.
user: Daria, a civic data volunteer turning permit lists into reusable tables.
why_it_matters: Open data does not exist when the only source is a locked PDF.
mvp_scope: Upload PDF, extract tables, let humans correct fields, export CSV and JSON.
demo_examples: Convert a council annex into a cleaned table with correction log.
continuation_path: Publish conversion recipes and validation tests.
